## toSnakeCase() function

Convert a camelCase identifier to snake\_case.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function toSnakeCase(name: string): string;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type

name

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

string

## Example


```ts
toSnakeCase("createProject") // "create_project"
toSnakeCase("addToInbox")    // "add_to_inbox"
toSnakeCase("inbox")         // "inbox"
```
